markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on new content clusters and address strategic concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** New compliance clusters must focus exclusively on Discern's Secretary of State services to avoid misrepresenting the product's scope.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [**Accuracy & AI:** A new sourcing block will be added to articles. This improves content accuracy and boosts AI visibility by signaling credibility to models.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [**Renewal:** The contract will renew on the current plan. An expansion was deferred to Q2 due to Discern's limited internal capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - **Performance:** Discern is now the \#1 AI visibility result for its tracked prompts, up from \#2 last week.

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Accuracy

  - [**Problem:** New compliance clusters risk misrepresenting Discern's product scope by covering topics beyond its Secretary of State services (e.g., annual reporting, franchise taxes).](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new sourcing block will be added to all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [**Function:** Lists official sources (e.g., Dept. of Revenue, Secretary of State) with direct links.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Benefits:**](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
          - [**Accuracy:** Provides a clear reference for future updates.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
          - [**AI Visibility:** Signals credibility to AI models, increasing the likelihood of content being used in AI-generated answers.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Implementation:** GrowthX will investigate adding the block as a Webflow CMS component for automated publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)

### Content Clusters & Focus

  - [**Healthcare Compliance:** A high-priority cluster, as healthcare is a major Discern customer segment.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Healthcare companies frequently use Professional Corporations (PCs) and PLLCs and often operate across state lines.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [**Examples:** Warby Parker, Cure Care, Moxie, Brave Health, Fae Nutrition.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**Startup Formation & Compliance:** Will be general-purpose, not industry-specific.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)

### Performance & Reporting

  - **AI Visibility:** Discern's ranking improved from \#2 to \#1 for its tracked prompts.
  - [**Production:** A recent slowdown (14 articles published vs. 26 in progress) is temporary and due to an internal GrowthX transition.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Accuracy Spot-Check:** Mike will review recent articles for accuracy after GrowthX flagged formatting issues (e.g., broken links) from a previous writer.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Conversion Reporting:** The next phase of the partnership will track pipeline and revenue. Mike will connect Carrie with Danny (Go-to-Market) to define reporting access.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### Renewal & Expansion

  - [**Decision:** The contract will renew on the current plan.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [**Rationale:** An expansion was deferred to Q2 due to Discern's limited internal capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will draft and send the new renewal agreement.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
      - [Draft and send the renewal agreement.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [Investigate adding the sourcing block as a Webflow CMS component.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [Suggest 5–10 core AI visibility prompts for Mike's review.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [**Mike:**](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the "Keystone" calibration article to guide the new pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [Spot-check recent articles for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Connect Carrie with Danny to discuss conversion reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/hS9xTcotwYLtf7N9RP2NEtikh_fzZXRH?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
